Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class FixedIncome

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.FixedIncome

      public Optional<SpRating> spRating()
      Standard & Poor's (S&P) rating of the creditworthiness of borrowers. Correspondents must be configured to view this field.

      The date of Standard & Poor's (S&P) rating of the creditworthiness of borrowers. Correspondents must be configured to view this field.

    • withSpRating

      public FixedIncome withSpRating(SpRating spRating)
      Standard & Poor's (S&P) rating of the creditworthiness of borrowers. Correspondents must be configured to view this field.
